12 #include "../ILawConfigurator.h"
13 
14 #include "ConstantLawConfig_axl.h"
15 
16 #include "ArcRes/Entities/System.h"
17 #include "ArcRes/XPath.h"
18 
19 #include "ConstantLawType_law.h"
20 #include "ConstantLaw.h"
21 
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 
25 class ConstantLawConfigService
26  : public ArcaneConstantLawConfigObject
27 {
28 public:
29 
30  ConstantLawConfigService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
31  : ArcaneConstantLawConfigObject(sbi) {}
32 
33  ~ConstantLawConfigService() {}
34 
35  void configure(Law::FunctionManager& function_mng, ArcRes::System& system);
36 
37 private:
38 
39  ConstantLaw m_law;
40 };
41 
42 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
43 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
44 
45 void
46 ConstantLawConfigService::
47 configure(Law::FunctionManager& function_mng, ArcRes::System& system)
48 {
49  // Set Law Parameters
50  m_law.setParameters(options()->parameters().value());
51 
52  // Set Law Arguments
53  ConstantLawType::Signature signature;
54  Gump::Property out = ArcRes::XPath::property(system, options()->output().result());
55  signature.result = out;
56 
57  // Register Law
58  function_mng << std::make_shared<ConstantLawType::Function>(
59  signature, m_law, &ConstantLaw::eval);
60 }
61 
62 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 
65 using namespace Arcane;
66 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_CONSTANTLAWCONFIG(ConstantLawConfig,ConstantLawConfigService);
